title: HR Coordinator
description: Vanguard is seeking an HR Coordinator for our Boston office to support human resources functions across the region. You'll manage employee records, coordinate benefits administration, and support various HR initiatives. This hybrid role offers exposure to human resources operations and the chance to contribute to our people-focused culture.
responsibilities: Maintain employee records and ensure HRIS data accuracy; process updates and changes
Coordinate benefits administration, open enrollment, and employee communications
Support onboarding and offboarding processes for new and departing employees
Prepare HR reports and documentation for management review
Assist with employee relations matters and grievance tracking

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
skills: Attention to detail with ability to maintain confidentiality
Ability to work with diverse employee populations

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Paid time off and paid holidays
Professional development and HR certification support
